overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic dystopian urban environment. The player approaches a covered pedestrian overpass, ascends and crosses it, then continues along a walkway beneath multi-level elevated highways with industrial architecture and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with industrial buildings and construction barriers

events.description: approaching the entrance to a covered pedestrian overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past industrial buildings and construction barriers

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: small industrial building with rusted metal siding and security cameras
construction barriers with diagonal stripes lining the sidewalk edge
massive concrete highway structure rising in the distance
tall gold and black skyscraper with illuminated signage and geometric patterns
large floating platform or spaceport structure visible in the skyline

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit sidewalk in a futuristic city, passing industrial sheds and construction barriers. The camera moves toward a pedestrian overpass entrance with a massive highway ramp and distinctive yellow skyscraper visible in the background. A futuristic vehicle drives past on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian overpass with concrete stairs and neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered staircase, transitioning from bright natural sunlight to dim artificial neon lighting
exiting the covered bridge, returning to natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs inside the covered pedestrian bridge, then descending the other side

entered.detail: enclosed concrete walkway with roof and side windows crossing over the highway
wide stairs with metal railings ascending and descending through the structure
long fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling providing artificial illumination

segments.scene_description: Inside a covered pedestrian overpass, ascending and descending concrete stairs illuminated by linear neon lights. The enclosed space has small windows offering views of the highway and cityscape below. The yellow skyscraper is visible through the far exit as the camera descends back to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway interchange with billboards

events.description: exiting the staircase onto an open pedestrian walkway beneath multi-level highway overpasses

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange-paved pedestrian path beneath the elevated highways, following other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in yellow plaid shirt walking ahead on the pedestrian path

entered.detail: complex concrete highway structure with multiple decks and ramps overhead
wide paved path with distinctive orange and red coloring running beneath the highways
large digital and static advertisements mounted on the highway support structures
massive concrete columns supporting the elevated highway decks
metal fencing separating the walkway from the road and construction areas

segments.scene_description: Walking along an orange-paved pedestrian path beneath a massive multi-level highway interchange. The area is shaded by the overpasses above, with concrete support pillars lining the path and advertising billboards visible ahead. Other pedestrians walk in the same direction, including a man in a yellow plaid shirt, while vehicles pass on the road to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open city sidewalk through a confined pedestrian overpass and into the shaded depths of a massive highway interchange. It begins by moving past industrial sheds and construction barriers under a clear sky, passing a futuristic vehicle as a yellow skyscraper looms in the distance. As the camera enters the covered overpass, the environment shifts to an enclosed concrete space where the camera ascends and descends stairs illuminated by linear neon lights. The scene then opens back up to street level, transitioning from the bright exit toward an orange-paved path sheltered by the heavy concrete pillars of a multi-level highway. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the shadows of the overpasses, passing other pedestrians and advertising billboards while traffic flows along the adjacent road.
